speaker: speaker1
text: How do you decide what grade we get ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I look at many things , attendance , quizzes , and tests .

speaker: speaker1
text: What is the most important factor ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Obviously I look for improvement as we go along , but I would like you to do your best from the beginning .

speaker: speaker1
text: How can we keep track of our grades ?

speaker: speaker2
text: The final and midterm are 40 percent of your grade ; homework , attendance , and quizzes total 60 percent .

speaker: speaker1
text: What if we can't get to school ?

speaker: speaker2
text: You can only miss one class without penalty .

speaker: speaker1
text: If we have a major problem , will you let us know ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I will be letting you know during the year if you have a major problem .
